title: test_coverage=0.697 — not all tests fully passing
evidence: retort.db: test_coverage=0.697, defect_rate=1.0. Build succeeded and test gate passed, but coverage/pass-rate is 69.7%, indicating some tests were skipped or partially effective.
suggestion: Investigate which tests skip due to data-dependent conditions; consider making tests self-contained with fixture data.

title: sharedDataset helper conditionally skips all query tests if data dir is missing
evidence: query_test.go:22 t.Skipf("data directory missing: %v", err) and query_test.go:32 t.SkipNow() — used by 10 integration tests
suggestion: Data is present in this workspace, so this skip should not fire. But the pattern means these tests are not self-contained.
